title: To Frida
content:
(Dedicated to L.L.)


    Walls separate us.
    Strange spider webs.
    But I often fly, gaunt in my sinking
    Hand wringing room, a bleeding chirping twit.
    If only you were there.
    I am so murdered.
    Frida.
meaning:
Alfred Lichtenstein's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "To Frida"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
